business_model: Transport Marketplace connecting Shippers with Carriers
geographic_scope: EU-wide coverage with strategic expansion to UK and Scandinavia
value_proposition: Online platform for courier and freight services
strategic_goals: Minimize carrier costs for transport sales
key_business_process: Blind auction system - lowest carrier bid wins assignment

digital_products.name: Booking Platform
digital_products.purpose: Multi-step booking process with price calculator

digital_products.name: Express Panel
digital_products.purpose: Data capture and transport allocation tool

known_challenges: High early-stage carrier churn (47% don't exceed 5 bids)
Intransparent bidding process creates user frustration
New carriers have disadvantaged starting conditions
Short-term allocation strategy conflicts with long-term value
competitive_landscape: Other freight platforms with more transparency
market_position: Leading German online provider, but perceived as static and intransparent compared to competitors
